name: claude-migrate
description: (beta) Migrate Claude.ai chats and projects to a new Claude account. Parse export or extract live -> deterministic value scan -> you confirm -> distill resume briefs -> re-create projects + seed chats. Always emits a byte-exact copy page (zero tooling); optional confirmation-gated browser automation (seed -> await OK -> rename -> strip). Requires the `ultra` plugin and a local Node + Playwright runtime for byte-exact verification.
